title: The Humpy Dance
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls governance functions with flash-loaned tokens in the same transaction.

red_flags: Large vote swings in short periods
summary: Humpy, a DeFi whale, manipulated Compound Finance's governance system by flash-loaning tokens to sway votes, leading to a significant transfer of funds. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for governance calls following flash loans.
